report.name: MVWF_PERMIT

dataSource.name: Q_PERMIT
dataSource.select: SELECT DECODE(UPPER(TRIM(:P_SORT)), 'COUNTY', C.Cnty_Nm || ' - ' || S.Site_Name, 'PERMITTEE', Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Get_Permittees( P.Perm_Num, P.Prog_Id, P.Perm_Exp_Date, 'LAST_FIRST', '; ') || ' - ' || P.Perm_Name, 'SITE', S.Site_Name, P.Perm_Name) Col_Sort, P.Perm_Num, P.Perm_Name Permit, TO_CHAR(P.Perm_Eff_Date, 'YYYY') Renewal_Year, 'DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' || CHR(10) || UPPER(PT.Perm_Type_Desc) || ' LICENSE' Perm_Type, S.Site_Id, S.Site_Name Site_Name, Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Format_Address( GLI.Addr_Strt_1, GLI.Addr_Strt_2, GLI.Addr_City, GLI.Addr_St, GLI.Addr_Zip, GLI.Addr_Zip_Plus_4) Site_Addr, P.Perm_Eff_Date, P.Perm_Exp_Date, TO_CHAR(P.Perm_Exp_Date, 'fmMONTH DD, YYYY') Exp_Date, TO_CHAR(P.Perm_Eff_Date, 'fmMONTH DD, YYYY') || ' TO ' || TO_CHAR(P.Perm_Exp_Date, 'fmMONTH DD, YYYY') Perm_Dates, P.Prog_Id FROM Permit_Type PT, Permit P, Status_Type ST, Application A, Site_Affiliation SA, Site S, Geo_Loc_Info GLI, Counties C WHERE PT.Perm_Type_Id = P.Perm_Type_Id AND P.Stat_Type_Id = ST.Stat_Type_Id AND P.Perm_Num = A.Perm_Num AND A.Site_Affil_Id = SA.Site_Affil_Id AND SA.Site_Id = S.Site_Id AND S.Site_Id = GLI.Site_Id AND GLI.Cnty_Id = C.Cnty_Id(+) AND PT.Perm_Type_Name = 'MVWF' AND ST.Stat_Type_Name = 'JVA' AND EXISTS( SELECT * FROM Application A2 WHERE A2.Perm_Num = P.Perm_Num GROUP BY A2.Perm_Num HAVING MAX(A2.App_Name) = A.App_Name) &P_CRITERIA_PERMIT ORDER BY 1

dataDescriptor.expression: DECODE ( UPPER ( TRIM ( : P_SORT ) ) , 'COUNTY' , C.Cnty_Nm || ' - ' || S.Site_Name , 'PERMITTEE' , Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Get_Permittees ( P.Perm_Num , P.Prog_Id , P.Perm_Exp_Date , 'LAST_FIRST' , '; ' ) || ' - ' || P.Perm_Name , 'SITE' , S.Site_Name , P.Perm_Name )
'DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' || CHR ( 10 ) || UPPER ( PT.Perm_Type_Desc ) || ' LICENSE'
Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Format_Address ( GLI.Addr_Strt_1 , GLI.Addr_Strt_2 , GLI.Addr_City , GLI.Addr_St , GLI.Addr_Zip , GLI.Addr_Zip_Plus_4 )
TO_CHAR ( P.Perm_Eff_Date , 'fmMONTH DD, YYYY' ) || ' TO ' || TO_CHAR ( P.Perm_Exp_Date , 'fmMONTH DD, YYYY' )

dataSource.name: Q_ORG
dataSource.select: SELECT SA.Org_Id, SA.Site_Id SA_Site_Id, Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Format_Org_Name( O.Busn_Nm, O.Frst_Nm, O.MI, O.Lst_Nm, 'FIRST_LAST') Permittee, Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Format_Address( AH.ADRH_Strt_1, AH.ADRH_Strt_2, AH.ADRH_City, AH.ADRH_St, AH.ADRH_Zip_Cd, AH.ADRH_Zip_Plus_Four, NULL, --pvCounty Pkg_WUTM_Util.F_Format_Org_Name( O.Busn_Nm, O.Frst_Nm, O.MI, O.Lst_Nm, 'FIRST_LAST')) Permittee_Addr FROM Site_Affil_Type SAT, Site_Affiliation SA, Organization O, Address_History AH WHERE SAT.Site_Affil_Type_Id = SA.Site_Affil_Type_Id AND SA.Org_Id = O.Org_Id AND SAT.Site_Affil_Type_Name = 'PERM' AND O.Org_Id = AH.Org_Id AND AH.AdTyp_Cd = 'M' AND EXISTS( SELECT * FROM Address_History_Program_XRef AHPX WHERE AHPX.Org_Id = AH.Org_id AND AHPX.AdTyp_Cd = AH.AdTyp_Cd AND AHPX.Prog_Id = SA.Prog_Id HAVING MAX(AHPX.ADRH_No) = AH.ADRH_No) AND SA.Prog_Id = :Prog_Id AND SA.Site_Id = :Site_Id AND NVL(TRUNC(SA.Site_Affil_Start_Date), NVL(:Perm_Exp_Date, TRUNC(SYSDATE))) <= NVL(:Perm_Exp_Date, TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AND NVL(TRUNC(SA.Site_Affil_End_Date), NVL(:Perm_Exp_Date, TRUNC(SYSDATE))) >= NVL(:Perm_Exp_Date, TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY O.Busn_Nm, O.Lst_Nm, O.Frst_Nm

dataSource.name: Q_SIGNATURE
dataSource.select: SELECT Image Signature FROM DEQ_Image I, DEQ_Image_XRef DIX, System_Parameters SP, Program P, Organization O WHERE I.Image_Id = DIX.Image_Id AND DIX.Org_Id = SP.SParm_Num_Val AND DIX.Prog_Id = P.Prog_Id AND P.Prog_Name = 'JV' AND DIX.Org_Id = O.Org_Id AND SP.SParm_Nm = 'WUTMB_CHIEF'

textSegment.string: *The sort order of envelopes is site name and recipient name.
for [Sort Order] to generate "&CF_MVWF_PERMIT" in the same order as the envelopes.

THIS ANNUAL LICENSE IS CONDITIONED ON THE CONSTRUCTION AND MANAGEMENT OF THE FACILITY AS APPROVED BY THE DEPARTMENT AND ON CONDITIONS IMPOSED BY THE ORIGINAL LICENSE. THE LICENSEE SHOULD BE AWARE THAT ITS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH APPLICABLE LAWS OR RULES, IN PARTICULAR TITLE 75, CHAPTER 10, PART 5, MONTANA CODE ANNOTATED, AND ADMINISTRATIVE RULES OF MONTANA TITLE 17, CHAPTER 50, SUB-CHAPTER 2, MAY RESULT IN ENFORCEMENT ACTIONS, LICENSE REVOCATION, OR DENIAL OF AN APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL.
ERROR: No CURRENT Permittee as of &PERM_EFF_DATE
THIS CERTIFICATE IS NOT TRANSFERABLE. A LICENSE RENEWAL APPLICATION IS DUE &EXP_DATE.

function.name: t_changelog
cf_wutmb_chief_f
cf_permittees_f
cf_file_f
cf_mvwf_permit_f
cf_url_envelope_f
f_cp_url_all_envelope_ft
after_param_form
b_error_permittee_ft

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
<html>
<head> <meta name="GENERATOR" content="Oracle 11gR1 Reports Developer"/> <title> Your Title </title>
<rw:style id="yourStyle"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts style link clause here --> </rw:style>
</head>
<body>
<rw:dataArea id="yourDataArea"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts the default jsp here --> </rw:dataArea>
</body> </html>
<!-- </rw:report> -->
